name: Push'em all
core_loop: Swipe to move the character, use an expanding stick to push crowds of enemies off the platform, and reach the end of the level.
audience_proxy: Casual gamers of all ages looking for simple, satisfying, and quick action-oriented gameplay sessions.
visual_style: Minimalist 3D with bright, contrasting colors and simple stickman-like figures.

palette.description: Vibrant blue water and green/sandy platforms contrasted sharply by bright red enemy figures.
